landing.title: ikimon.life — Walk, find, write it in the notebook
landing.heroHeadingPlain: Your usual walk becomes an adventure.
landing.heroLead: Nearby nature becomes a little more interesting. A travel photo becomes a reason to come back. AI supports clues and understanding, while people remain responsible for observation and review.
heroPromiseChips: Nearby nature gets a little more interesting
One travel photo becomes a reason to return

dailyDashboard.title: Start observation, revisit, nearby change, and review here
dailyDashboard.lead: The top page now chooses a field note worth seeing today and turns it into the next action.
dailyDashboard.seasonalEmpty: Seasonal clues are still being collected

recordToday.title: Write today's note
recordToday.body: Save what you found with a photo and a short note.

revisitPlace.title: Return to a place you walked
revisitPlace.body: The same place changes when the season moves.

nearbyPulse.title: See where nearby records are moving
nearbyPulse.body: Use active areas as a reason for the next walk.

needsId.title: Open a record that needs a name
needsId.body: Turn an uncertain record into the next discovery.

landing.toolSectionTitle: Two ways to feed the notebook
landing.toolSectionLead: Field Note is the core. Lens helps you see better on site, and the Explore Map returns reasons to go now and reasons to come back later.

lens.title: Walk with an AI guide reading the world around you
lens.body: Point your camera and the AI narrows what to check next. It is a support layer, not the final answer, and helps turn the moment into a record.

scan.title: Find reasons to go now and reasons to return
scan.body: Use map bias, seasonality, and gaps to understand why here, why now, what one visit can add, and what could bring you back again.

landing.mapSectionTitle: Revisit places worth walking again, on the map
landing.mapSectionLead: For locals, it returns revisit reasons. For travelers, it returns reasons to stop here now and hooks to come back later.
landing.mapEmpty: No observations on the map yet

fieldLoop.title: Field Loop
fieldLoop.lead: Aim from the satellite, check it on foot, write it in the notebook. The more you run this cycle, the more the same path looks different.

steps.title: 1. Aim from the satellite
steps.body: Edges, water, wetlands, succession zones — find the suspicious places before you leave home.

steps.title: 2. Narrow it down to three
steps.body: Decide which microhabitat to verify, what to photograph, and what context to write down.

steps.title: 3. The AI never overclaims
steps.body: It tells you what it saw, what evidence is missing, and which shot is worth taking next.

steps.title: 4. The deltas pile up
steps.body: Season by season, the differences stack, and a reason to come back keeps growing.

principles: We train the eye, not just the answer.
We thicken the context before we push for certainty.
We never blur blank with absent.
We keep uncertainty and deltas as data, too.

community.title: Community | ikimon
community.heading: Join walks and themed surveys
community.lead: Start with a solo walk, then sometimes look at the same place with others. Community events, themed surveys, and small local programs live here.
